state_space: Population distribution of syntactic rules and lexical usage frequencies
dynamics_operator: Intergenerational transmission, stochastic learning, social interaction
perturbation_operator: Transmission errors, substrate interference, language contact, sociolinguistic innovation
stability_condition: Fixation or high-frequency equilibrium of grammatical variants
failure_mode: Grammatical restructuring, Creole formation, language death
notes: Grammar persists through continuous imperfect replication without singular state attractors.
persistence_ontology_rationale: Derived via structural matching of observables and dynamics to ontology definitions.

metric_layer.distance_definition: Numeric distance strictly derived from domain object fields.

assumptions: Assumed no numeric boundaries exist since none provided.

measurement_layer.distance_provenance: Deterministically triaged via M-Layer v0 rules.
